message: Node started: Conduct a rigorous investigation into the following claims in lattice Yang-Mills theory: 1) The validity of 'beta < 1/6' as a mass gap threshold. 2) The existence and derivation of a 'B^2 formula' related to this threshold. 3) Whether there is a recognized 'irreparable gap' in the logic of these specific claims. Search academic databases (arXiv, INSPIRE-HEP) and textbook literature to determine if these are standard results, fringe theories, or mathematical errors. Provide the consensus view of the physics community.
